scope_statement: Govern repeated macro-side autonomy seeds that harden the pattern surface process without building public code, reading public-root scratch contents as authority, or mutating self-indexing-cognitive-substrate.
required_orientation: ./repo-python kernel.py --entry "refire macro pattern surface autonomy seed" --context-budget 12000
read current_reconstruction_truth_index_v1.json before selecting a write target
read the latest same-lane receipt from macro_pattern_autonomy_process_runs_v1.jsonl before editing

already_run_lane_detection.rule: If the latest same-lane receipt already changed the proposed target artifact and validation passed, select the next incomplete self_refire_target or refine the existing contract instead of duplicating the same edit.

same_lane_append_order_policy.latest_selection_rule: Select the same-lane receipt with the highest JSONL source line among rows whose assigned_lane equals this contract's assigned_lane; do not use wall-clock timestamp sorting and do not require the same-lane row to be the global log tail.
same_lane_append_order_policy.prior_pointer_rule: Every same-lane receipt after the first must set prior_same_lane_run_id to the immediately previous same-lane receipt by JSONL append order.
same_lane_append_order_policy.interleaved_lanes_policy: Rows from other assigned lanes may appear before, between, or after same-lane rows in the shared JSONL log. They are counted as interleaving evidence but must not create duplicate-work failures for this lane.
same_lane_append_order_policy.anti_claim: This policy hardens macro-side receipt selection only; it does not serialize concurrent seeds, block other assigned lanes, or authorize public-root writes.

duplicate_target_refinement_policy.applies_to: adjacent same-lane receipts whose self_refire_target.target_artifact_ref is unchanged
passing_evidence_any: the later receipt changed the repeated target artifact
the later receipt captured an exact blocker in residual_capture_refs
the later receipt changed self_refire_target.target_artifact_ref away from the prior same-lane receipt
duplicate_target_refinement_policy.rule: A repeated self_refire target is allowed only when the current run either refined that target or captured a blocker; otherwise the seed is looping instead of ratcheting.

seed_output_freshness.rule: A seed output is stale when its receipt lacks the current contract fingerprint, validation command list for the edited artifacts, and either a current truth-index fingerprint or an explicit hash-loop exclusion marker for the generated truth-index cycle.

pass_with_residual_capture_requires: modified JSON/MD/Python artifacts parse or compile
external residual has exact unblock conditions
blocked_with_residual_recheck_requires: self_refire_precondition_review.status == reviewed_blocked_by_unmet_precondition when a deferred self_refire target is still blocked
validation fixed-point commands rerun after the receipt append
validation_status_contract.anti_claim: This contract accepts captured and rechecked outside-lane residuals only for macro process closeout accounting; it does not mark the external residual fixed or authorize public-root writes.

residual_capture_lifecycle_policy.applies_when: latest same-lane run has validation_status == pass_with_residual_capture or blocked_with_residual_recheck
residual_capture_lifecycle_policy.ref_resolution_rule: Every residual_capture_refs value on a pass_with_residual_capture row must resolve to either a Task Ledger event_id in state/task_ledger/events.jsonl or a subject_id visible in Task Ledger authority/projection.
residual_capture_lifecycle_policy.acceptance_rule: Resolved residual captures must carry Task Ledger payload.acceptance text so unblock conditions are durable outside chat.
residual_capture_lifecycle_policy.reuse_rule: If a residual_capture_refs value appeared on an earlier same-lane run, the latest run's residual_lifecycle_review.reused_residual_capture_refs must name it and residual_lifecycle_review.recheck_commands must be non-empty.
residual_capture_lifecycle_policy.new_ref_rule: Residual refs that did not appear on earlier same-lane rows must be named in residual_lifecycle_review.new_residual_capture_refs.
residual_capture_lifecycle_policy.anti_claim: This policy validates residual capture lifecycle for macro autonomy closeout only. It does not mark the external residual fixed, execute the owning lane, or authorize public-root writes.

fixed_point_order: append or update the current same-lane run receipt in macro_pattern_autonomy_process_runs_v1.jsonl
validation_fixed_point_policy.readiness_consumption_rule: The final projection_readiness_check_receipt_v1.json must consume the latest same-lane run by JSONL source line, expose latest_run_id, latest_run_source_line_no, latest_run_append_index, and accept latest_run_validation_status before the seed closes.
validation_fixed_point_policy.anti_claim: This policy hardens macro-side closeout ordering only; it does not serialize concurrent lanes, authorize public-root writes, or certify public runtime behavior.

self_refire_target_contract.selection_rule: The next refire target must be specific enough that a later seed can start from it without re-reading stale reports or asking for permission.

default_next_targets.target_reason: harden the public closeout fixture against duplicate same-lane autonomy outputs
default_next_targets.expected_next_action: add a negative fixture payload or validator receipt predicate only if the existing five-case coverage does not already catch the failure
default_next_targets.stop_condition: fixture manifest, readiness checker, and truth index all pass

self_refire_precondition_gate.applies_to: same-lane runs whose prior self_refire_target text contains deferred prerequisite markers
self_refire_precondition_gate.rule: When the prior same-lane self_refire target is explicitly deferred until a reducer or batch prerequisite, a repeated same-lane seed must not consume that target early. It must either prove the prerequisite satisfied or capture the blocker and select a process-guard refinement.
self_refire_precondition_gate.anti_claim: This gate prevents macro autonomy seeds from consuming deferred self-refire targets early. It does not execute the reducer, satisfy other lanes, authorize public-root writes, or build public code.

prompt_linter_contract.scope_note: Scan only macro-side reconstruction prompt and seed markdown surfaces listed here; do not inspect prompt shelf bodies, provider payloads, operator thread content, release, dissemination, recipient, hosted-public, or website surfaces.
allowed_replacements: make one concrete macro-side edit or capture a blocker
do not use public-root scratch contents as authority

anti_claim: This contract improves macro-side autonomy seed behavior only. It does not build public code, authorize public-root writes, publish anything, or certify public runtime behavior.
